failed.reason:
Operating profit below ₹15 cr in: Year 1, Year 2, Year 3
Suggested remedy: Demonstrate ≥ ₹15 cr operating profit in each of the last 3 full financial years (restated, consolidated).
failed.title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr in each of last 3 years

failed.reason:
Net worth below ₹1 cr in: Year 1, Year 2, Year 3
Suggested remedy: Demonstrate ≥ ₹1 cr net worth in each of the last 3 full financial years (restated, consolidated).
failed.title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr in each of last 3 years

failed.reason: Specified securities held by promoters are not in dematerialised form.
failed.title: Promoter's specified securities in dematerialised form

failed.reason: Equity shares offered for sale have been held for less than one year.
failed.title: Maximum holding period for equity shares offered for sale

failed.reason: Holding period of one year not complied with at the time of filing the draft offer document.
failed.title: Holding period compliance at draft offer

failed.reason: No credit rating obtained from at least one credit rating agency.
failed.title: Credit rating for CDI issuance

failed.reason: No debenture trustee appointed in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act and SEBI regulations.
failed.title: Debenture trustee requirement for CDI

failed.reason: Missing specified securities resulting from a bonus issue.
failed.title: Specified securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution (I)(a)(ii)

failed.reason:
Pre-issue capital held by non-promoters not locked in for 6 months.
Suggested remedy: Lock-in pre-issue capital held by non-promoters for a period of 6 months from the date of allotment.
failed.title: Lock-in of pre-issue capital held by non-promoters

failed.reason: Specified securities not locked-in according to clause (a) of regulation 16 or not held by promoters.
failed.title: Lock-in for specified securities (a)

failed.reason: Specified securities not locked-in according to clause (b) of regulation 16 or not held by promoters.
failed.title: Lock-in for specified securities (b)

failed.reason: Specified securities not held by promoters or ineligible.
failed.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities

failed.reason: Loan not granted to the issuer company or its subsidiary(ies) for financing one or more of the objects of the issue.
failed.title: Pledge conditions (a)

failed.reason: Loan not granted with pledge of specified securities as a term.
failed.title: Pledge conditions (b)
